summary: Tested territory pricing feature - dynamic pricing from Supabase territory_pricings table. All backend API tests passed (9/9). Frontend Subscribe page loads correctly, displays dynamic county pricing, and calculates totals properly.

minor.issue: Health check endpoint returns 404 - endpoint doesn't exist (not critical)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Supabase territory_pricings data: Jackson/Electrician=$500, Union/Plumber=$255, Alachua/Mechanic=$12000
context_for_next_testing_agent: Territory pricing API at POST /api/contracts/territory-pricing works correctly. Frontend Subscribe page at /subscribe (password gate: 123) fetches and displays dynamic pricing. Counties without pricing show '—' and Territory Total only sums counties with prices.
